Package org.platkmframework.databasereader.core

Class DatabaseReader

java.lang.Object
org.platkmframework.databasereader.core.DatabaseReader
public class DatabaseReader extends Object
Author: Eduardo Iglesias Contributors: Eduardo Iglesias - initial API and implementation Las contraint son: - llave primaria - llave foranea - unique - check Indices - tienen una estructura con informacion particular de cada tabla

    • progressInfo

      public void progressInfo(String msg)
      Procesar como relacion many to one o vs, todas las foreing key menos la que ya se hicieron como relacion muchos a mushcos, o 1 a 1 public void addcionarMayToOne(String tableName,Mapinvalid input: '<'String,List> mapResult, Mapinvalid input: '<'String, ForeingKey> mapForeingKeys, List listFkName, List oldAssociations,Mapinvalid input: '<'String,String> mapTableIdentifier){ for (Iterator it = mapForeingKeys.keySet().iterator(); it.hasNext();) { String fkName = (String)it.next(); if(listFkName==null || !listFkName.contains(fkName)){ ForeingKey foreingKey = mapForeingKeys.get(fkName); Association association = new Association(); EndPart fkEndPart = new EndPart(); fkEndPart.setTableName(mapTableIdentifier.get(tableName)); fkEndPart.setIsNavegable(true); fkEndPart.setIsOwner(true); fkEndPart.setModifier("MANY"); //fkEndPart.setName(tableName); fkEndPart.setBridge(false); EndPart pkEendPart = new EndPart(); pkEendPart.setTableName(mapTableIdentifier.get(foreingKey.getPkTableName())); pkEendPart.setIsNavegable(true); pkEendPart.setIsOwner(false); pkEendPart.setModifier("ONE"); //pkEendPart.setName(tableName); pkEendPart.setBridge(false); association.getEndPart().add(fkEndPart); association.getEndPart().add(pkEendPart); association.setForeingKey(foreingKey); //en relaciones recursivas, no ponerle a una entidad //la relacion dos veces adicionarAssoc(mapResult, association, tableName,oldAssociations); if(!tableName.equals(foreingKey.getPkTableName())){ adicionarAssoc(mapResult, association, foreingKey.getPkTableName(),null); } } } }

    • getLog

      public String getLog()

    • main
